title: Tweelix
description: Fabric survival utility mod with one-click inventory clearing, free camera, and mining assistance features
body:
Tweelix is a functional Minecraft Fabric mod focused on enhancing the vanilla survival experience, providing survival assistance features and convenient operation options.

## Main Features
## Quick Inventory Cleanup

### Quick drop all items from inventory
- Supports whitelist/blacklist settings (blacklist has higher priority)
- By default preserves enchanted gear, damaged equipment, food, firework rockets, and shulker boxes
- Optional setting: ignore hotbar items

### Suspicious Block Protection
- When enabled, prevents breaking suspicious sand, suspicious gravel, and their supporting blocks underneath
- Can be normally broken while sneaking

### Shader Pack Quick Access
- Adds a shader pack button below the resource pack button
- Opens shader selection interface when clicked

### Mining Enhancements
- Wall Mining: Prevents breaking blocks below configured blocks when not sneaking, keeping walls flat and intact
- Flat Mining: Maintains horizontal mining without breaking blocks below the player's position
- Add Mining Cooldown: Adds a customizable cooldown after each mining action, can be configured to only trigger while sneaking
- Remove Mining Cooldown: Removes the default 5gt cooldown after mining

### Free Camera (Soul Out-of-Body)
- Free movement in spectator mode
- Middle mouse button to enter entity perspective
- Can hide player model, hotbar, and status bar
- Supports inertia, sprint multiplier, and acceleration adjustment
- Renders first-person hand animations for spectating players
- Auto-enables night vision when activated

### Tour Mode
- Prevents block breaking/placement
- Prevents entity damage

### Crosshair Target Copy
- Copies ID, name, coordinates, and tags of targeted blocks/entities/inventory items

### Game Mode Switch Extension
- Allows opening mode switch interface in survival mode
- Executes custom commands when lacking permissions
- Supports switching to Tour Mode/Free Camera

### Nether Ceiling Display
- Displays single-layer bedrock positions in the Nether

### Multiplayer Port Fixation
- Port to 25565
- Provides port refresh button

## Usage Instructions
- Place Tweelix and MaLiLib into the mods folder
- Press Z key in-game to open the configuration interface
